title: Broker (High Commission)
description:
Job Title: Broker (Consultancy Firm)

Location: Singapore
Remuneration: Fully Commission-Based (Very Attractive Scheme)


About the Company
Our client is a dynamic consultancy firm dedicated to delivering tailored business solutions to a diverse portfolio of clients. To support their growth, they are seeking highly motivated and results-driven Brokers to join their team.


Key Responsibilities

  • Develop new business opportunities by tapping into personal and professional networks.
  • Promote the firm’s consultancy services and provide value-added solutions to clients.
  • Manage the full sales process, from lead generation to negotiation and deal closure.
  • Maintain strong client relationships and ensure repeat business.
  • Stay updated on industry developments and market trends to identify growth opportunities.

Requirements

  • Proven track record in sales, brokerage, or business development.
  • Established client network or database of leads to leverage.
  • Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to work independently.
  • Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
  • Driven, self-motivated, and goal-oriented personality.
  • Candidates with more years of experience with management experience might be offered a Team Lead role

What’s on Offer

  • Fully commission-based role with highly attractive earning potential.
  • Opportunity to work in a new & nice office
  • Autonomy and flexibility to manage your own portfolio.
  • Opportunity to be part of a growing consultancy firm with strong market presence.


We value every application, but only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you for considering this opportunity!


WeCruit Pte Ltd | EA License No. 20C0270

EA Personnel: Tan Soon Hock (Steven) | Registration No. R1109889

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
postedCompany.name: WECRUIT PTE. LTD.
